title: Fairer Crafting
description: Modifies the game's crafting recipes to make crafting certain things less expensive
body:
Modifies the game's crafting recipes to make crafting certain things less expensive


Current content (as of 1.0.1):

Tweaked:

-Pressure plates, buttons, fences, fence gates and wood give 4 per craft

-Trapdoors, signs, doors give 6 per craft

-Stairs give 8 per craft

-Bamboo gives 4 planks by block instead of 2 (consistency with other logs)

-Chains need 3 nuggets only

-Can craft stone tools with stone


Added:

-Pressure plates, buttons, fences, fence gates, woods, trapdoors, signs, doors, stairs, slabs and chests can be crafted with logs with a x4 yield (obviously since 1 log = 4 planks)

-Can decompress amethyst and nether wart blocks into the same amount needed to make them

-Can turn stone/deepslate into cobblestone/cobbled deepslate

-Can craft spider webs with 5 strings
